summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TaskFlow Notion-style task manager. All core functionality working including auth gating, dashboard, CRUD operations, and drag & drop kanban board.

ui_bugs.issue: Color input field has malformed value error when trying to set hex color

passed_tests: Backend API authentication with session token
Dashboard summary loads with correct counts
Auth gating redirects unauthenticated users to login
Tasks CRUD operations with comprehensive fields
Kanban board loads with correct columns (todo, in_progress, done)
Drag & drop moves tasks between columns and persists
Navigation between all pages works correctly
Task filtering by status, category, and search
UI components are responsive and accessible
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor fix needed: Categories color input field validation - currently throws 'malformed value' error when setting hex colors. All other functionality working perfectly.
